Fix npm detection: use exit code instead of output string

commit.message:
Fix game hang by correcting CPU branch timing

Branch taken (+1) and page-crossing (+2) cycle penalties were lost because
branch() incremented this.cycles but execute() overwrote it with the base
cost. Use a branchPenalty field that gets added after execute() returns.
Also remove temporary debug instrumentation from PPU and NesEmulator.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Remove -lbnetapi from Makefile
- Update README.md links

- The program doesn't use any network functionality

repository.name: HaiClaude
repository.description: Native Haiku GUI launcher for Claude Code

commit.message:
Add component diagram in draw.io format

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix game hang after screensaver by delivering APU frame counter IRQs to CPU

The APU's isIrqPending() was never checked in the main loop, so games
relying on APU IRQs for timing (e.g. Double Dragon & Battletoads) would
spin indefinitely waiting for an interrupt that never fired.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add APU implementation for sound support

Implement NES Audio Processing Unit with pulse, triangle, and noise
channels, wired into the CPU bus and main emulation loop. Audio output
uses javax.sound.sampled at 44100 Hz.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix game freeze after title screen by adding NMI edge detection, PRG RAM, and DMA NMI handling

- Trigger NMI immediately when game enables NMI via PPUCTRL while VBlank is active
- Add 8KB PRG RAM at $6000-$7FFF so game state reads/writes work correctly
- Check for NMI during DMA transfer to avoid missing VBlank interrupts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add README with architecture overview, setup, and API docs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement notification system with server cluster, workers, emulators, and load testing

- Notification server: REST API, input validation, template rendering, Redis caching, RabbitMQ routing
- Notification worker: 4 dedicated queue consumers (APNS/FCM/SMS/EMAIL) with retry logic
- Third-party emulator: simulates delivery services with 95% success rate
- Device emulator: receives notifications, WebSocket broadcast, REST stats
- Load client: seeds test data, multi-threaded load test with p95/p99 reporting
- Infrastructure: PostgreSQL, Redis, RabbitMQ, Prometheus, Grafana with pre-provisioned dashboard
- Docker Compose with service health checks and replicas
- 27 unit tests covering validation, services, controllers, consumers
- Component diagram in drawio format

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(model-3d): merge coplanar wall faces to prevent stretch artifacts

After Case 3 extrude, gap-filling triangle walls share vertices with
moved corners. Subsequent extrudes move those corners, stretching the
triangles into large sloping faces. Fix: merge coplanar wall faces
into adjacent side faces immediately after creation. The side face
absorbs the triangle into a larger polygon that stretches correctly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix all navigation links to use smooth scrolling

Footer and navbar links now use scrollIntoView with smooth behavior instead of dead anchor hrefs. Added section IDs to WhyDQView, UseCases, and GlobalPresence components. Company links now point to meaningful sections (About Us → why-dqview, Partners → global-presence, Contact → demo). LinkedIn link now uses actual URL.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Read CF Access JWT from CF_Authorization cookie (not just header)

CF adds Cf-Access-Jwt-Assertion as a header at the proxy level, but
browser fetch() calls don't include proxy-injected headers. They DO
send the CF_Authorization cookie that CF sets in the browser.

Now check_auth reads JWT from either source:
- Cf-Access-Jwt-Assertion header (direct proxy requests)
- CF_Authorization cookie (browser fetch/XHR requests)

This fixes CF Access bypass not working in the browser — users were
always seeing the password login screen even when accessed through CF.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Initial commit: Apple Watch Heart Rate Variability Monitor

Complete implementation of HRV monitoring app for Apple Watch:
- 32 HRV metrics (time-domain, frequency-domain, nonlinear)
- NeuroKit algorithms ported to Swift
- HealthKit integration for data persistence
- Background sampling every 15 minutes
- SwiftUI interface with Charts framework
- Comprehensive documentation

Features:
- Time-domain: SDNN, RMSSD, pNN50, NN50, etc.
- Frequency-domain: VLF, LF, HF, LF/HF ratio
- Nonlinear: Poincare plot, Sample Entropy, DFA, CSI/CVI
- Artifact correction and signal processing
- Historical data visualization (7d, 1m, 6m, 1y)

Platform: watchOS 9.0+, iOS 16.0+
No third-party dependencies

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: heart-rate-variability-monitor

commit.message:
fix: E2E CI サーバー二重起動 + gitleaks 誤検知を修正 (#365)

1. E2E_REUSE_SERVER=true を Smoke テストステップに追加
   - WF が nohup で起動済みの Next.js を run.ts が再起動し EADDRINUSE
   - run.ts の shouldReuseServer() で既存サーバーを再利用

2. .gitleaks.toml でパスベースの allowlist を追加
   - pricing/page.tsx の FAQ i18n キー定義が generic-api-key に誤検知
   - .gitleaksignore のコミットハッシュ方式はリベースで無効化されるため

feat: Add Settings tab with tool-call display toggle (#1892)

Rename the Workflow tab to Settings and add a toggle for inline
tool-call display. When enabled, Edit/Write tool calls are shown
chronologically in the message stream (like DM threads) instead
of grouped in the ThreadActivityDrawer.

- Add per-channel `channelSettings` store persisted to localStorage
- Create ChannelSettings.svelte wrapping workflow + toggle UI
- Refactor ThreadPanel's `isDmChannel` gate into `showInlineDiffs`
  that also checks the per-channel setting

  sessions) with fallback to agentToolItems

* refactor: エージェントワークフロー v2 — 構成見直し・権限制限・ドキュメント整理

- cleanup エージェントを coder に統合 (coder → reviewer → qa の3ステップに)
- TL の権限を制限 (gh pr merge 不可、ローカル作業後に PR 作成)
- reviewer を PR 投稿なしに変更 (コンテキストで TL に返す)
- TL にレビュー/QA 指摘の妥当性判断フローを追加
- QA にカバレッジ確認・テストケースレビューを追加
- リファクタリング提案の issue 化フロー (coder/reviewer → TL が起票)
- PM に平文指示の issue 化・並列実行検討・実行 issue 一覧を追加
- BLOCKED 時のエラー詳細フォーマットを統一
- TL ブランチ命名規則を定義 (feat/<issue番号>-<概要>)
- Issue テンプレート3種追加 (task, refactoring, user-action)
- ドキュメント整理 (テスト方針→ARCHITECTURE, テスト規約→CODING_GUIDELINES, 実装済み設定→TOOLCHAIN から削除)
- 列挙値管理ルールを CODING_GUIDELINES に追加
- users.ts の as アサーション除去
- CI の対象ディレクトリを packages/backend/frontend に限定、削除済み validation 参照を除去

commit.message:
refactor: Consolidate jq calls, deduplicate cost loops, prune history

Reduce subprocess overhead on the hot path by merging 4 separate jq
input-parsing calls into one. Replace duplicate weekly/monthly cost
loops with a shared sum_cached_costs() that batches all date lookups
into a single jq invocation. Remove dead validate_int (no callers
after prior refactor). Add history pruning on save to bound growth
of statusline_data.json to the current year.

commit.message:
Preserve post-holder records on tenure end; keep full history

- isAssignmentEffectivelyActive: remove isAssignmentActiveByTenure check —
  tenure expiry is now informational only, not an auto-deactivation trigger.
  Post holders remain active until admin explicitly ends or suspends them.
- deleteLeadership: active posts now get 'End Tenure' (status='ended',
  ended_on=today, record preserved in history) instead of hard delete.
  Already-ended/suspended posts get a permanent-remove confirmation.
- hardDeleteLeadership: separate explicit permanent-delete function.
- deleteClassRep: same tenure-end-first pattern as leadership.
- Table buttons relabelled: 'End Tenure' for active, 'Remove' for ended.
- syncPostHolderHistory called after tenure-end so profile history updates.

commit.message:
feat(product-design): add LLM high-fidelity HTML preview as Stitch fallback

When Stitch MCP is unavailable, automatically generate high-fidelity
HTML preview pages using Claude + Tailwind CDN + CSS variables from
tokens.json. Cross-screen consistency guaranteed at code level (shared
CSS custom properties), not by AI generation luck.

New Step 5.6 flow:
- Phase A: tokens.json → _tokens.css + _design-system.html (anchor)
- Phase B: parallel Agent generation of per-screen HTML pages
- Phase C: navigation page + consistency check (auto-fix hardcoded values)

Degradation chain: Stitch → LLM hifi HTML → wireframe preview

commit.message:
fix: 使用requestAnimationFrame修复移动端音频进度条不更新的问题

问题：
- 电脑浏览器上进度条正常更新
- 手机浏览器上进度条不更新

根本原因：
- 移动浏览器为省电会降低timeupdate事件触发频率
- 导致React重渲染频率不足以更新UI

解决方案：
- 使用requestAnimationFrame主动更新进度
- 添加100ms节流避免过度重渲染
- 通过play/pause事件监听器管理动画循环
- 确保移动端也能流畅显示进度条变化

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement all 15 VECTOR game design suggestions + celebration game over

Pass A (feel): sound FX via programmatic tone generation, randomized bomb
positions, catch pop animation, screen shake on bomb hit, creature spawn
fade-in, restricted east-wall spawn bounds, colorblind type initials on
stickers.

Pass B (depth): catch streak multiplier (1x/1.5x/2x) with HUD pill,
late-game escalation at 15s (5th bomb, faster bob, 10-creature waves),
creature behavioral archetypes (pacer/blinker/drifter/fader), zone-based
spawn weighting (ponds/trees/school), pause menu (ESC), 0.8s spawn delay
between waves.

Pass C (retention): per-trainer personal bests in stats.json, cumulative
all-time catch counter displayed on game over screen.

Also adds game_design_review.html (VECTOR design audit) and celebration
mode game over screen (score count-up, floating bubbles, pill name entry).

commit.message:
feat: warm palette + cursor-pointer + vibe selection + design refinements

Design system changes:
- Color palette: warm neutral tones with teal primary (#2AB4A0), replacing
  cool blue-tinted oklch values with hex. Warm brown undertones throughout.
- All interactive elements: cursor-pointer (button, checkbox, radio, switch,
  select, tabs, dropdown items, command items)
- Sticky frosted-glass topbar (sticky top-0 z-30 with overlay-bg)
- Auto-hiding scrollbars (invisible by default, appear on hover)
- Micro-animations: popover/dropdown scale 0.98 at 120ms open/80ms close,
  slide distance reduced to slide-in-from-*-1
- Sheet: gravity-feel animation (400ms open, 200ms close), max-w-lg
- Border radius: unified 8px for all radius tokens
- hover-lift: simplified to border-color transition only
- Grain texture: larger SVG, opacity 0.06, no mix-blend-mode
- tw-animate-css dependency added

Interview: vibe/palette selection (Step 6):
- 5 preset vibes: Friendly, Professional, Creative, Bold, Minimal
- Custom option for user-provided hex color
- Each vibe sets full palette (primary, backgrounds, borders, charts)
- Vibe saved to intent.json for documentation vault

Documentation updated:
- design-system.md: warm palette, sticky topbar, uniform radius, cursor,
  scrollbars, micro-animations, grain texture
- component-catalog.md: cursor-pointer and animation override warnings
- guided-setup.md: expanded Step 6 with vibe palettes
- setup.md: vibe/primaryColor in intent.json
